heroSection.heroSubtitle: Established in 2002, with over two decades of experience in the energy industry

mainSection.sectionBody:
Founded in 2002 (formerly known as Hengfeng Energy), Lasting Qual Pte. Ltd. is an innovative enterprise specializing in the research, development, production, sales, and service of drilling and production equipment for the energy industry. Headquartered in Singapore, the company is committed to providing comprehensive drilling and production solutions.

As a **Tier 1 supplier on CNPC’s No. 1 Network and a member of Sinopec Group’s Yipai Ke platform**, we possess comprehensive network access qualifications. Leveraging our robust R&D capabilities and global supply chain, we maintain long-term, stable strategic partnerships with industry leaders such as CNPC, Sinopec, Jereh Group, and Dongfang Honghua.

middleSection.middleSubtitle: Ability to engage in long-term collaboration with clients worldwide

cards.title: Mission
cards.summary: Our mission is to serve our customers, create value for them through high-quality products and services, and promote sustainable development in the energy industry.

cards.title: Business Philosophy
cards.summary: Guided by the principles of “integrity, mutual benefit, and innovation,” we are committed to building long-term partnerships with our clients and partners based on trust and respect.

cards.title: Vision
cards.summary: To become a comprehensive multinational corporation integrating R&D, manufacturing, services, and trade, and to be the most trusted partner in the energy industry.

bottomList.title: HSE
bottomList.summary: Health, Safety and Environment Management System
